title: pulicaria hirta
intro: Pulicaria hirta, also known as fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Pulicaria hirta has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Pulicaria hirta is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and can be used both internally and externally.
